Armand Corporation offers construction and program management services, specializing in areas such as construction management at risk, construction management as agent, program management, and design-build. Their typical customers include public, private, and partnership-based entities across various sectors, such as commercial buildings, cultural and entertainment facilities, disaster recovery programs, education institutions, government agencies, infrastructure projects, multi-family housing, and transportation and aviation programs. Armand Corporation positions itself as a company that takes responsibility for realizing dreams, rebuilding hope, and restoring faith in communities. They claim to differentiate themselves through their acute expertise and process in construction and program management, offering specialized services tailored to specific needs
